description: Mutable Dictionary<SkillLevel, string> used for an immutable lookup table. Since this is a static readonly field that never changes, it should use FrozenDictionary or at minimum IReadOnlyDictionary to communicate immutability and prevent accidental mutation.
suggestedFix: Change the field type to FrozenDictionary<SkillLevel, string> (from System.Collections.Frozen) or IReadOnlyDictionary<SkillLevel, string>.

description: GetDisplayName will throw a KeyNotFoundException if called with an invalid SkillLevel value (e.g. (SkillLevel)99). There is no defensive check or TryGetValue.
suggestedFix: Use DisplayNames.TryGetValue(level, out var name) and throw an ArgumentOutOfRangeException with a clear message if the key is not found.

description: SkillType enum members lack explicit integer values, unlike every other enum in this codebase. This inconsistency makes SkillType fragile -- reordering members would silently change their numeric values, which can break JSON serialization/deserialization of saved games.
suggestedFix: Add explicit integer values: Keeper = 0, Defending = 1, Playmaking = 2, Winger = 3, Scoring = 4, Passing = 5, SetPieces = 6, Stamina = 7.
